calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Keck (Former Attorney). Suzanne McDonnell for and with Maria Teresa Perez (Administrator).

Ms. McDonnell reported that there is no suit filed on the rejected creditor claim. Issues with regard to Attorney's Fees, Mr. Keck's request for extraordinary fees and payment of $7,350.00 to Ms. Perez for Administrator's Fees without Court approval were addressed. The matter was taken under submission. Ms. McDonnell will submit a new order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Continued To Mar-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Continued To Mar-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Suzanne McDonnell for and with Maria Perez (Administrator). Michael Keck former Attorney for Maria Perez.

The Court informed Counsel that time for Creditors Claim expires on March 5, 2012. Ms. McDonnell addressed the issue of statutory fees. If Counsel cannot agree on allocation of the statutory fees, they will have to file a supplement. Mr. Keck is ordered to return Estate funds in the amount of $19,650 by February 14, 2012. If the Administrator is claiming reimbursement of expenses, receipts will be needed. The accounting petition was continued to March 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any additional pleadings are due by March 15, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
